analysis.reasoning: Core message: A U.S. State Department spokesperson expresses support for Iranian protesters seeking the right to choose their future, stating "We stand with them." Evaluation: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not explicitly invoked; no reference to U.S. historical values or legacy. US2 (admirable society) – Not about U.S. society or groups. US3 (hostile enemies) – The tweet does not depict an adversary as immoral or hostile; it focuses on supporting protesters, not condemning the Iranian regime. US4 (force for good) – Yes; the U.S. positions itself as supporting human rights and oppressed peoples by standing with Iranian protesters. US5 (great international ally) – Not about allies or partnership. US6 (at the forefront) – No leadership/primacy claim. Conclusion: The tweet promotes US4.
